meaning: n.优生学家,提倡人种改良者
examples: The colonial policies of the 19th century, undergirded by a racist and eugenicist Zeitgeist, have little to do with the reality of today.
And, yes, most politicians, including Coolidge, Harding, Woodrow Wilson and Theodore Roosevelt, uttered unattractive, eugenicist statements from time to time.
